title: Under Two Flags
writer: Tod Browning, Elliott J. Clawson, Edward T. Lowe Jr.
actors: Priscilla Dean, James Kirkwood, John Davidson
plot: An English nobleman, known only as Victor, arrives in Algiers and joins the French Foreign Legion as a private without revealing his true identity. He attracts and is loved by Cigarette, a French-Arab girl and "daughter of the reg...
